use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF CHRONIC HEPATITIS B IN ADULT PATIENTS

indications.text:
1.1 Chronic Hepatitis B
Tyzeka is indicated for the treatment of chronic hepatitis B in adult patients with evidence of viral replication
and either evidence of persistent elevations in serum aminotransferases (ALT or AST) or histologically active
disease.
